description_long: This armchair features a plush, dark brown velvet upholstery on its arms, back, and base, contrasted by a floral-patterned fabric on the seat and inner backrest. The backrest is high and slightly winged, with a central tufted section that adds a touch of elegance. The armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily padded, with decorative gold trim and wooden accents visible at the front. The seat consists of two distinct, thick cushions, each covered in the same floral fabric as the backrest. The legs are short, slightly curved, and made of wood, providing a sturdy foundation. Overall, the armchair exudes a classic, ornate style suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A plush, dark brown velvet armchair with wide, padded arms, floral-patterned cushions, and ornate gold and wood accents. The high, tufted backrest and curved wooden legs give it a classic, elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the floral-patterned seat and back cushions, tufted central backrest, and ornate padded armrests with gold trim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, dark brown velvet back and the curved shape of the armrests.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the armrest's padding and the seat's thickness.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, rounded, padded and upholstered with dark brown velvet, gold trim and wood accents
attribute_backrest_style: high, slightly winged, central tufted section, upholstered in dark brown velvet with floral fabric
attribute_upholstery_pattern: floral print on seat and back cushions, solid dark brown velvet on arms and exterior
